title: Refabricated Menu
description: This mod adds a new loading screen and main menu...
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6404f0f6f14c05c92fe68df4f81527e1ff97ba9a.png) That one popular mod, but for newer versions of our beloved game! Some creds: [NoobTrieu](https://modrinth.com/user/NoobTrieu) --- ![fabric-api](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40143109ed1cd4ec4c2b8a49a3d642682ed54ef5.png) [

Fabric Api is required!

](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) --- ![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc34c47b9254bc2b0760405a3ba0be7394971a40.jpeg) Preview of mod's work ---
